headline: María Corina Machado SLINGS Nobel Medal to Trump 🍑🏆🔥
text:
Venezuelan FREEDOM QUEEN 👑 María Corina Machado 💃🇻🇪 just DROPPED her NOBEL PEACE PRIZE MEDAL 🏆✨ on DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊👨‍💼 at a STEAMY White House meetup 🏛️😍 – calling it a 'HISTORIC DAY' 📅💥 for her peeps after US BADASSES seized MADURO 😈🚔 in Caracas for DRUG TRAFFICKING SLAM 🥴💊! Trumpie 🥳 tweeted it's a 'WONDERFUL GESTURE of MUTUAL RESPECT' 🤝💕, even tho he SALTY AF 😤 when she snagged it last year instead of his glow-up Nobel dreams 🌟🍆!

Machado SPILLS TEA ☕ to journos: 'Recognition for Trump's UNIQUE COMMITMENT to our FREEDOM' 🗽🔥 – channeling MARQUIS DE LAFAYETTE vibes 🐴⚔️ gifting WASHINGTON medal to BOLIVAR 💪🇻🇪, now Venezuela's returning the FAVOR 200 years later like a BOSS 🕺📜! Nobel Committee SIMPS OUT 🤡🚫 saying 'NO SHARING, NO TRANSFERRING' 📜❌ – medal can SWAP OWNERS 🏷️➡️ but LAUREATE TITLE STAYS LOCKED 🔒 forever, per their salty statement 💅. White House peeps like Karoline Leavitt 📢 hyping Machado as 'REMARKABLE BRAVE VOICE' 🗣️💥, Trump calling her 'WONDERFUL WOMAN who's been thru HELL' 😢👸 after supporters CHANT 'MARÍA, PRESIDENTE' 📣🇻🇪 outside gates!

Trump PLAYING 4D CHESS ♟️😎 – NO ENDORSE for Machado's 2024 ELECTION WIN CLAIM 🗳️🏆, instead BROING OUT with acting PREZ Delcy Rodríguez 👩‍💼🇻🇪 (Maduro's ex-VP glow-up ✨), calling her 'TERRIFIC PERSON' after PHONE BANGER 💬📞 full of 'PRODUCTIVE COURTESY' 🤝😘! Rodríguez STRUTTING in Caracas speech: 'I'll ROCK UP to Washington STANDING TALL, NO CRAWLING' 🧍‍♀️💪 – embassy reopening vibes incoming 🚀🏛️ via her CLOSE ALLY envoy 👯‍♀️. Meanwhile, Trump admin SLAYING VENEZUELA OIL GAME 🛢️💰 – FIRST $500M SALE DROPPED 💸📈, seizing SIXTH TANKER 🚢🔒 like pirate bosses 🏴‍☠️!

Machado HITTING CONGRESS 🏛️⚖️, senators simping 🤤, trying to FLIP Trump on backing Rodríguez's INTERIM SQUAD ❌ – but Donnie says she LACKS DOMESTIC JUICE 🧃📉, sticking to 'FREEDOM FIGHTER' props 🙌 while REMAKING oil sector post-sanctions BRRRR 💨🛢️! Historic BROTHERHOOD between 🇺🇸🇻🇪 against TYRANNY 😡⛓️ – Trump finally gets his SHINY Nobel FLEX 🏆🍑 without the committee's drama 😂👀! María to supporters: 'We can COUNT ON TRUMP' ✅🍊 – VENEZUELA'S BACK, BAYBEE 🚀🇻🇪‼️
